plugin_desc: Allot enterprise service gateway SNMP baseline child template for network-service devices under Allot PEN 2603. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public facts confirm Allot enterprise gateway monitoring and private SNMP MIB identity, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-health scalar semantics, so private service, traffic and policy tables are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
